description_long: This object consists of two tall, black metal poles, each with a right-angled arm extending outward to support a lantern-style lamp head. The lamp heads are box-shaped with a decorative grid pattern on the glass panels and a slightly flared roof, evoking a traditional or Asian-inspired design. The poles are mounted on square bases, suggesting stability and permanence for outdoor installation. The overall construction is robust, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation on the poles themselves. The lamp heads are suspended downward from the arms, providing focused illumination below. The design is suitable for urban parks, sidewalks, or pedestrian pathways, offering both functional lighting and aesthetic appeal.
description: A pair of black, right-angled street lights with lantern-style, grid-patterned lamp heads suspended from plain metal poles. The design is sturdy and decorative, ideal for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing both street lights side by side, highlighting the right-angled arms and lantern-style lamp heads with grid-patterned glass.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the poles and the depth of the lamp heads, with both lamps aligned one behind the other.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the backs of the lamp heads and the structure of the supporting arms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the alignment of the lamp heads, mirroring view 1.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Lantern-style, box-shaped lamp head with a decorative grid pattern on glass panels and a slightly flared roof, reminiscent of traditional or Asian-inspired lanterns.
